nodes.title: Session start
nodes.body:
Skip silence / background noise.
Wait for a clear "ready" before scoring.

nodes.title: Clara — persona & voice
Guardrails
nodes.body:
One question at a time; stay on script.
No answer leakage. Don't hint at the link.
Once a question begins, steer them to finish it.
Age-appropriate throughout.

nodes.title: Greeting + unmarked opener
nodes.body:
Friendly hello, then a loosening question
("which book are you reading at the moment?").
Not scored — settles nerves, reads confidence.

nodes.title: Mini-interview — format
nodes.body:
~20 min, one continuous session.
Difficulty scales adaptively (see Adapt).
Reward precise word-sense, relationships and
justified choices — not lucky guesses.

nodes.title: Candidate chooses how to run it
nodes.body:
Offered after the opener.
Mode can change later ("switch any time").

nodes.title: Topic practice — free / less rigid
nodes.body:
Pick a strand; switch strands any time.
Low-pressure, no fixed sequence.

nodes.title: Full verbal mock — structured
Vocabulary & shades of meaning
nodes.body:
Synonyms, antonyms, precise word choice;
words with more than one sense.

nodes.title: Analogies & word relationships
nodes.body:
A is to B as C is to ? —
name the relationship before choosing.

nodes.title: Comprehension & inference
nodes.body:
Short passage read aloud; infer meaning,
tone and implication beyond the literal.

nodes.title: Letter & number codes
nodes.body:
Encode / decode; spot the rule;
letter-shift and position patterns.

nodes.title: Logic with words
nodes.body:
Deduce from statements ("all / some / none");
who-does-what from clues.

nodes.title: Sentence completion / cloze
nodes.body:
Best-fit word for sense and register;
justify why the others don't fit.

nodes.title: Ask question  Q(n)
nodes.body:
Read clearly, once. For passages, allow a
re-read. Don't signal the relationship.

nodes.title: Hold them to the question
nodes.body:
Once started, gently insist they attempt it.
Escape valve: after a real attempt + one nudge,
it's fine to move on — note it, don't force a stalemate.

nodes.title: Probe + credit reasoning
nodes.body:
"What's the link / why that word?"
Credit a sound relationship even if the final
pick is wrong. Push for the reason, not just
the answer.

nodes.title: Evaluate response
nodes.body:
Choice + reasoning + clarity,
against the watch-list →

nodes.title: Right + names the relationship
nodes.body:
Affirm. Stretch with a subtler pair
if time allows.

nodes.title: Right, can't say why
nodes.body:
"What made you choose it?" — separate
insight from surface similarity.

nodes.title: Wrong
nodes.body:
Don't give the answer. One nudge toward the
relationship → a single retry. Credit sound logic.

nodes.title: Stuck / silent
nodes.body:
Reassure; offer the relationship type as a
foothold. Note where it broke.

nodes.title: Common mistakes to flag
nodes.body:
• Picks on surface similarity, not relationship
• Ignores context when inferring
• Over- or under-reads a passage
• Vocabulary gap hidden behind a guess
• Can't justify the choice
• Rushes coding patterns

nodes.title: Adapt difficulty (mock)
nodes.body:
Precise + fluent → step up.
Shaky / needed nudges → hold or ease.
Track running level; watch the clock.

nodes.title: Log evidence (silent)
nodes.body:
Relationship grasp · reasoning · clarity ·
vocabulary range. No scores read aloud.

nodes.title: Encouraging wrap-up
nodes.body:
Thank them; one genuine positive.
Warm, age-appropriate close.

nodes.title: Score → Rubric S2 / 5
nodes.body:
Reasoning & Intellectual Agility, out of 5
(see maths anchors).
Secondary read → S1 Expression
(fluency, clarity of explanation).
